title: 100pc Silver Plastic Cable Ties, 3 Different Sized Tie Wraps, Durable Strong Plastic Material Ensuring Longevity, Self Locking Zip Ties Ideal for Home, Office, Garden and DIY (Silver)
features: 🖥️➰ 🔌➰ 100 BLACK CABLE TIES, SELF LOCKING AND EASY TO USE - These cable ties are simple to use and require no special tools or expertise. Simply loop the cable tie around your cords or cables, and pull the end of the tie through the head of the tie to tighten and secure it in place

🖥️➰ 🔌➰ STRONG AND DURABLE FOR LONG LASTING STRENGTH - The cable ties are made from strong and durable plastic material, ensuring that they can withstand regular use and hold up well over time. Whether you need to secure cords in the garage or bundle cords in the office, these cable ties are sure to get the job done and last for a long time

🖥️➰ 🔌➰ 3 DIFFERENT SIZES AND VERSATILE IN DIFFERENT SETTINGS - The ties come in 3 different lengths - 10cm (3.93"), 15cm (5.90") & 20cm (7.87"). The 100 piece set of cable ties is ideal for use in a variety of settings, including homes, offices, and gardens. The assortment of white ties can be used to secure cords, cables, and other items that need to be organised or bundled

🖥️➰ 🔌➰ COLOURED BLACK UV RESISTANT - The cable ties are black and can be used both indoors and outdoors. Great for securing whatever you need in place whether it's in the garden, the garage or inside in the office.

🖥️➰ 🔌➰ FLEXIBLE AND EASY TO THREAD - The flexible tail of the cable tie and its ergonomic design allow for easy and smooth threading. Its internal teeth ensure an optimal fit for the cable tie without damaging the object to be held and the head guarantees high-tensile strength, ensuring strong tightening
description: A 100pc assorted silver cable tie set is a versatile and convenient solution for organising all of your cables and cords. Made from high-quality, durable plastic, these cable ties are ideal for use in the home, office, or garden, and come in an assortment of sizes to accommodate all of your organisational needs. The simple design makes them quick and easy to use, and the convenient packaging makes them easy to store and transport, ensuring that you always have the right size cable tie on hand whenever you need it. Comes in 3 different lengths - 10cm (3.93"), 15cm (5.90") & 20cm (7.87")
